_workflow_info.title: Inpainting - VAEEncodeForInpaint Method
_workflow_info.description: Better edge handling via grow_mask_by expansion and gray-pixel encoding in masked regions. Works with any model. The mask is automatically attached as noise_mask.

_meta.title: VAE Encode (for Inpainting)
_meta.notes: Key differences from plain VAEEncode: (1) grow_mask_by expands mask by N pixels via convolution for smoother latent-space boundaries; (2) masked pixel regions are set to 0.5 (neutral gray) before encoding to prevent color leakage; (3) noise_mask is automatically attached to the latent output.

inputs.text: a beautiful flower garden, vibrant colors, detailed petals
